name: Australian Dollar vs US Dollar

personality.summary: Smooth, technically clean pair. Respects trendlines, channels and S/R better than most majors. Lower volatility than gold - moves are slower and ranges tighter. Risk-sentiment currency: trends when equities/commodities trend. One of the few majors genuinely active in the 00:00-05:00 SAST window because it is Sydney/Tokyo's home pair.
personality.spread_behavior: Consistently tight; only mildly wider at rollover
typical_moves: Sydney open (00:00 SAST) sets the initial direction of the day
Tokyo (02:00-08:00 SAST) provides its most active non-London hours
London often retraces or extends the Asian move
Trends in clean channels on H1; range-bound weeks are common

key_technicals.moving_averages: H1 50 EMA is the trend filter; price hugging it = range, clean separation = trend
key_technicals.channels: Draws exceptionally clean parallel channels - trade channel top/bottom rejections on M15
key_technicals.round_numbers: Reacts at every 50 pips (0.6650, 0.6700); 00 levels are major
key_technicals.bollinger: In Asian hours BB(20,2) on M15 contains price well - band-fade scalps work in this pair specifically
key_technicals.rsi: Mean-reverts reliably from RSI 70/30 on M15 during Asian and late-NY hours

steps: Confirm no trend: H1 price within 20 pips of 50 EMA, flat slope
On M15, wait for a close outside BB(20,2) with RSI > 70 or < 30
Enter on next M5 reversal candle back inside the band
SL beyond the extreme wick, TP at BB midline (20 SMA). 1:1 typical
Draw the active H1/M15 channel (minimum 3 touches)
Enter on M5 rejection candle at channel boundary in channel direction
SL 10-12 pips beyond boundary, TP mid-channel then far boundary

scalping_plan.risk: Targets 6-12 pips per scalp. Do not scalp AUDUSD during low-ATR chop between 12:00-14:00 SAST.

steps: Wait for M15 pullback into H4 demand/supply or 38.2-61.8% fib
M15 BOS in bias direction = entry
SL beyond pullback swing, target PDH/PDL or channel boundary, trail after 1R

after_hours_00_05_sast.conditions: This IS AUDUSD prime time. Sydney open 00:00 SAST, Tokyo open 02:00 SAST. Liquidity is real, spreads fine. Watch for RBA-related moves (rate decisions ~06:30 SAST on RBA days) and Australian data 03:30 SAST.
after_hours_00_05_sast.verdict: TRADEABLE - the best pair on your list for this window alongside USDJPY.
playbook: 00:00-02:00: fade extremes of the late-NY range; moves are small, take 5-8 pips
02:00-05:00: trade Tokyo momentum - if Tokyo breaks the Sydney range with conviction, trade continuation pullbacks on M5
Avoid 03:30 SAST exactly on Australian data days (jobs, CPI) - technicals suspend for 15 min
Keep targets modest: the window's full range is often only 20-35 pips

invalidations_and_traps: London frequently reverses the entire Asian move - close Asian-session scalps before 09:00 SAST
Breakouts without commodity/risk backing tend to fail - prefer pullback entries over breakout entries
Do not counter-trend against a strong H4 trend just because M15 RSI is extreme
